info.title: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM - Learner Learning Records/Completion Details
info.description:
Last Updated January 2026

You can use Oracle REST APIs to view and manage data stored in Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM.

Whether you're experienced with or new to REST, use this guide to find what you need, including:

  • A quick start how-to that walks you through a simple request example.
  • Use cases that provide real-world solutions with code examples.
  • Detailed descriptions for each REST resource.
info.x-summary: Last Updated January 2026 You can use Oracle REST APIs to view and manage data stored in Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM.

parameters.name: learnerLearningRecordsUniqID
parameters.description: This is the hash key of the attributes which make up the composite key for the Learner Learning Records resource and used to uniquely identify an instance of Learner Learning Records. The client should not generate the hash key value. Instead, the client should query on the Learner Learning Records collection resource in order to navigate to a specific instance of Learner Learning Records to get the hash key.

parameters.name: completionDetailsUniqID
parameters.description: This is the hash key of the attributes which make up the composite key for the Completion Details resource and used to uniquely identify an instance of Completion Details. The client should not generate the hash key value. Instead, the client should query on the Completion Details collection resource in order to navigate to a specific instance of Completion Details to get the hash key.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: When this parameter is provided, the specified children are included in the resource payload (instead of just a link). The value of this query parameter is "all" or "". More than one child can be specified using comma as a separator. Example: ?expand=Employees,Localizations. Nested children can also be provided following the format "Child.NestedChild" (Example: ?expand=Employees.Managers). If a nested child is provided (Example: Employees.Managers), the missing children will be processed implicitly. For example, "?expand=Employees.Managers" is the same as "?expand=Employees,Employees.Managers" (which will expand Employees and Managers).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
This parameter filters the resource fields. Only the specified fields are returned, which means that if no fields are specified, no fields are returned (useful to get only the links). If an indirect child resource is provided (Example: Employees.Managers), the missing children will be processed implicitly. For example, "?fields=Employees.Managers:Empname" is the same as "?fields=;Employees:;Employees.Managers:Empname" (which will only return the "Empname" field for Managers). the value of this query parameter is a list of resource fields. The attribute can be a direct (Example: Employees) or indirect (Example: Employees.Managers) child. It cannot be combined with expand query parameter. If both are provided, only fields will be considered.

Format: ?fields=Attribute1,Attribute2

Format for fields in child resource: ?fields=Accessor1:Attribute1,Attribute2

parameters.name: onlyData
parameters.description: The resource item payload will be filtered in order to contain only data (no links section, for example).

parameters.name: dependency
parameters.description:
This parameter specifies dependencies which are fields that are set before and rolled back after generating the response. Generally they are used to preview the effects of an attribute change. The fields specified in this parameter are always set in the resource instance in question. When a child resource collection is requested and the parameter is set, the fields will be set in the parent resource instance before generating the resource collection payload. The value of this query parameter is a set of dependency fields. Example: dependency=ProductId=2

Format: <attr1>=<val1>,<attr2>=<value2>

parameters.name: links
parameters.description:
This parameter can be used to show only certain links while accessing a singular resource or a resource collection. The parameter value format is a comma-separated list of : <link_relation>

Example:
self,canonical

parameters.name: REST-Framework-Version
parameters.description: The protocol version between a REST client and service. If the client does not specify this header in the request the server will pick a default version for the API.

parameters.name: Metadata-Context
parameters.description: If the REST API supports runtime customizations, the shape of the service may change during runtime. The REST client may isolate itself from these changes or choose to interact with the latest version of the API by specifying this header. For example: Metadata-Context:sandbox="TrackEmployeeFeature".

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: This parameter restricts the number of resources returned inside the resource collection. If the limit exceeds the resource count then the framework will only return the available resources.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Used to define the starting position of the resource collection. If offset exceeds the resource count then no resources are returned. Default value is 0.

parameters.name: totalResults
parameters.description: The resource collection representation will include the "estimated row count" when "?totalResults=true", otherwise the count is not included.  The default value is "false".

parameters.name: q
parameters.description:
This query parameter defines the where clause. The resource collection will be queried using the provided expressions. The value of this query parameter is one or more expressions. Example: ?q=Deptno>=10 and <= 30;Loc!=NY

Format: ?q=expression1;expression2

You can use these queryable attributes to filter this collection resource using the q query parameter:
  • activityAssignmentRecordId; integer; Activity assignment record ID for the learning activity attempt.
  • activityAttemptAEUnits; string; Actual units of learner effort to complete the activity. Valid values are defined in the ActivityAttemptActualEffortUnitsLOV list.
  • activityAttemptAEUnitsMeaning; string; Description of the activityAttemptAEUnitsMeaning attribute value.
  • activityAttemptActualEffort; number; Actual learner effort to complete the activity.
  • activityAttemptActualScore; number; Actual learner score for the activity attempt.
  • activityAttemptAssignedToDisplayName; string; Display name of the learning activity attempt assignee.
  • activityAttemptAssignedToId; integer; Friendly number identifying the learning activity attempt assignee.
  • activityAttemptAssignedToNumber; string; Friendly number identifying the learning activity attempt assignee.
  • activityAttemptAssignedToType; string; Type of user, such as Learner or Observer, assigned to the activity attempt. Valid values are defined in the ActivityAttemptAssignedToTypeLOV list.
  • activityAttemptAssignedToTypeMeaning; string; Description of the type of user assigned to the learning activity attempt.
  • activityAttemptComplDate; string; Completion date for the learning activity attempt.
  • activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode; string; Reason code for completion of a learning activity attempt.
  • activityAttemptDeepLink; string; Deep link URL for the activity when opened in a browser. It opens the learning item activity player.
  • activityAttemptEmbedLink; string; Deep link URL to embed the activity page in other pages.
  • activityAttemptExemptedDate; string; Exemption date for the learning activity attempt.
  • activityAttemptExemptedRC; string; Reason for the learning activity attempt exemption, such as Exempted - completed elsewhere, Exempted - higher level certification attained, or Completed offline and status verified. Valid values are defined in the AttemptExemptedReasonLOV list.
  • activityAttemptExemptedRCMeaning; string; Description of the activityAttemptExemptedRCMeaning attribute value.
  • activityAttemptId; number; Application-generated primary key.
  • activityAttemptLocked; string; Indicates whether the learning activity attempt is locked. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is N.
  • activityAttemptNextAction; string; Next activity action when the learner is working on the activity.
  • activityAttemptNumber; string; Number of attempts for the self-paced learning activity.
  • activityAttemptStartedDate; string; Date when the learner attempted the activity.
  • activityAttemptStatus; string; Status for the activity the learner is working on. Valid values include ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, and ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS. Valid value are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.
  • activityAttemptStatusMeaning; string; Description of the activityAttemptStatusMeaning attribute value.
  • activityComplRequirement; string; Completion requirement for the learning activity. Valid values are defined in the learning activityCompletionRequirementLOV list.
  • activityComplRequirementMeaning; string; Description of the activityComplRequirementMeaning attribute value.
  • activityContentDisplayMode; string; Determines how learners see the content, such as embedded.
  • activityCoverArtLink; string; URL to open the cover art directly from the browser.
  • activityDate; string; Date when the ILT activity was worked on. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.
  • activityDescription; string; Description of the learning activity.
  • activityDisplayOrder; number; Display order for the learning activities.
  • activityEffortUnits; string; Unit used to indicate the effort required to complete the learning activity, such as hour, minute, or month. Valid values are defined in the learning activityExpectedEffortUnitsLOV list.
  • activityEffortUnitsMeaning; string; Description of the learning activity effort units.
  • activityEndTime; string; ILT activity end time in the user's preferred time zone. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.
  • activityExpectedEffort; string; Expected effort for the learning activity.
  • activityId; integer; Application-generated primary key for the learning activity.
  • activityLearnerMarkCompl; string; Indicates whether the learner can mark the activity as completed. Valid value are Y and N. Default value is N.
  • activityLearnerRecordAttendance; string; Indicates whether learners can record their attendance for an activity.
  • activityNumber; string; Friendly number identifying the learning activity in the user interface.
  • activityPassingScore; number; Passing score for the activity.
  • activitySecComplRequired; number; Completion requirement for the activity section.
  • activitySectionAttemptCompletionProgress; number; Number of activities completed in a section.
  • activitySectionAttemptLocked; string; Indicates whether the learning activity section attempt is locked. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is N.
  • activitySectionAttemptStatus; string; Status for the learning activity section attempt. Valid values are defined in the learning activitySectionAttemptStatusLOV list.
  • activitySectionAttemptStatusMeaning; string; Description of the activitySectionAttemptStatus attribute value.
  • activitySectionDescription; string; Description of the activity section.
  • activitySectionDisplayOrder; number; Display order for the learning activity section.
  • activitySectionId; number; Application-generated primary key column.
  • activitySectionLongDescription; string; Long description of the learning activity.
  • activitySectionNumber; string; Number identifying the activity section.
  • activitySectionTitle; string; Name of the activity section.
  • activitySectionTotalActivities; number; Total number of activities in the section.
  • activityShortDescription; string; Description of the learning content activity.
  • activityShortTimeZone; string; Friendly format for the time zone.
  • activityStartTime; string; ILT activity start time in the user's preferred time zone. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.
  • activityTimeZone; string; ILT activity time zone. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.
  • activityTitle; string; Title of the activity.
  • activityTotalAttempts; number; Total learner attempts on the activity.
  • activityType; string; Activity type for the learning assignment. If the assignment is for a specialization, this represents a course. If the assignment is for a course, this represents offering types. Valid values are defined in the ActivityTypeLOV list.
  • activityTypeMeaning; string; Description of the learning activity type.
  • addToCalendarLink; string; Link to download the .ics file to add the ILT activity to the calendar. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.
  • allowFwdScrub; string; Indicates if forward scrubbing is enabled.Valid values are Y or N.
  • completionItemId; integer; Application-generated primary key of the completion item.
  • completionItemNumber; string; Friendly number identifying the completion item.
  • dataSecurityPrivilege; string; Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.
  • dataSecurityPrivilegeMeaning; string; Description of the value of the dataSecurityPrivilege attribute.
  • eLearnMarkCompletionOnOpen; string; Indicates whether to set the eLearning to complete when it's opened.
  • elearnAttemptReview; string; Indicates whether the learner can review the attempt. Valid values are ORA_WLF_ARAR_LAST_ATTEMPT and ORA_WLF_ARAR_DONT_ENABLE. Valid values are defined in the list ELearnAttemptReviewLOV.
  • elearnAttemptReviewMeaning; string; Description of the elearnAttemptReview attribute value.
  • elearnAttemptsAllowed; number; Maximum number of attempts allowed for the assessment self-paced learning activity.
  • elearnAutoLaunchOnPageOpen; string; Indicates whether the content needs to be automatically launched when the enrollment page opens.
  • elearnCoverArtLink; string; URL to open the learning cover art directly from the browser.
  • elearnDisableContentReview; string; Indicates whether the content review is disabled for the self-paced learning activity. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is N for self-paced learning activities with Video, PDF, Web link, SCORM, and HACP content types.
  • elearnDisableReview; string; Indicates whether to disable reviews for the self-paced learning activity.
  • elearnDisableReviewForPassedAttempts; string; Indicates whether the review for passed self-paced learning activity attempts is disabled. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is Y.
  • elearnHideActualScore; string; Indicates whether to hide the score for the self-paced learning activity.
  • elearnId; number; Application-generated primary key for the self-paced activity eLearning content.
  • elearnNumber; string; Number for identifying the self-paced activity content.
  • elearnQuestionnaireId; integer; Unique identifier for the questionnaire that's the self-paced assessment learning activity.
  • elearnQuestionnaireNumber; string; Question number of a question in the eLearning content.
  • elearnRecordedAttemptsRule; string; Rule for the maximum number of attempts allowed for the self-paced learning activity. Valid values are ORA_WLF_ARA_SNGL and ORA_WLF_ARA_LTD_NUM, ORA_WLF_ARA_UNLTD. Valid values are defined in the ELearnRecordedAttemptsRuleLOV list.
  • elearnRecordedAttemptsRuleMeaning; string; Description of the elearnRecordedAttemptsRule attribute value.
  • elearnRichMediaLink; string; URL to open the video directly from the browser.
  • elearnRichMediaSrcLink; string; Link to the rich media source file.
  • elearnShortDescription; string; Description of the self-paced activity learning content.
  • elearnShowResponseFeedback; string; Show response feedback for the self-paced learning activity.
  • elearnTimePERAttempt; number; Time limit per attempt on self-paced assessment learning activity.
  • elearnTimePERAttemptUnits; string; Unit of measure for the attempt time limit per self-paced learning assessment activity, such as Hours or Minutes. Valid values are defined in the ELearnTimePerAttemptUnitsLOV list.
  • elearnTimePERAttemptUnitsMeaning; string; Description of the elearnTimePERAttemptUnitsMeaning attribute value.
  • elearnTitle; string; Name of the self-paced activity learning content.
  • elearnType; string; Type of the self-paced learning, such as Video or SCORM. Valid values are defined in the LearnningContentTypeLOV list.
  • elearnTypeMeaning; string; Description of the elearnTypeMeaning attribute value.
  • parentLearningItemSubType; string; Learning item subtype, such as Video or Tutorial. Valid values are defined in the AssignedLearningItemSubTypeLOV list.
  • parentLearningItemSubTypeMeaning; string; Description of the learningItemSubType attribute value.
  • sectionAttemptComplDate; string; Date when the learner successfully completed the activity section.
  • virtualClassroomInformation; string; Additional information about the virtual classroom, if used in the ILT activity.
  • virtualClassroomJoinLink; string; Link to join the virtual classroom, if used in the ILT activity. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.
  • virtualClassroomType; string; Type of the virtual classroom, such as ad-hoc virtual classroom, named virtual classroom, or no virtual classroom. Valid values are defined in the VirtualClassroomTypeLOV.
  • virtualClassroomTypeMeaning; string; Description of the virtual classroom type.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: This parameter orders a resource collection based on the specified fields.  The parameter value is a comma-separated string of attribute names, each optionally followed by a colon and "asc" or "desc".  Specify "asc" for ascending and "desc" for descending. The default value is "asc".  For example, ?orderBy=field1:asc,field2:desc

parameters.name: finder
parameters.description:
Used as a predefined finder to search the collection.

Format ?finder=<finderName>;<variableName>=<variableValue>,<variableName2>=<variableValue2>

The following are the available finder names and corresponding finder variables

  • PrimaryKey Finds the completion details for learning assignments that match the specified primary key criteria.
    Finder Variables
    • activityId; integer; Unique identifier for the learning activity.
  • findByActivityAssignmentRecordIdAndActivityId Finds the completion details for learning assignments that match the specified assignment criteria.
    Finder Variables
    • activityAssignmentRecordId; integer; Unique identifier for the assignment record.
    • activityId; integer; Unique identifier for the learning activity.
    • dataSecurityPrivilege; string; Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the list DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV.
  • findByActivityId Finds the completion details for the given learning activity identifier.
    Finder Variables
    • activityId; integer; Unique identifier for the learning activity.
  • findByCompletionDetailsFilters Finds the completion details for the learning assignment that match the specified criteria.
    Finder Variables
    • activityAttemptStatus; string; Status for the assigned learning activity. Valid values are ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS and are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.
    • activityExpectedEffort; string; Expected effort for the learning activity.
    • activitySectionNumber; string; Number identifying the learning activity section.
    • activityTitle; string; Title of the learning activity.

parameters.name: learnerLearningRecordsUniqID
parameters.description: This is the hash key of the attributes which make up the composite key for the Learner Learning Records resource and used to uniquely identify an instance of Learner Learning Records. The client should not generate the hash key value. Instead, the client should query on the Learner Learning Records collection resource in order to navigate to a specific instance of Learner Learning Records to get the hash key.

parameters.name: Upsert-Mode
parameters.description: Contains one of the following values: true or false. If true, the server performs an Upsert operation instead of a Create operation. During an Upsert operation, the server attempts to find an existing resource that matches the payload. If a match is found, the server updates the existing resource instead of creating a new one. If not found or false (default), the server performs a Create operation. Note that the Upsert operation isn't supported for date-effective REST resources.

parameters.name: REST-Framework-Version
parameters.description: The protocol version between a REST client and service. If the client does not specify this header in the request the server will pick a default version for the API.

parameters.name: Metadata-Context
parameters.description: If the REST API supports runtime customizations, the shape of the service may change during runtime. The REST client may isolate itself from these changes or choose to interact with the latest version of the API by specifying this header. For example: Metadata-Context:sandbox="TrackEmployeeFeature".

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

Valid values include ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, and ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS. Valid value are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.

activityAttemptStatusMeaning.title: Activity Attempt Status Description
activityAttemptStatusMeaning.description: Description of the activityAttemptStatusMeaning attribute value.

activityComplRequirement.title: Activity Completion Requirement
activityComplRequirement.description: Completion requirement for the learning activity. Valid values are defined in the ActivityCompletionRequirementLOV list.

activityComplRequirementMeaning.title: Activity Completion Requirement Description
activityComplRequirementMeaning.description: Description of the activityComplRequirementMeaning attribute value.

activityCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Completion Predecessor Hints
activityCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activityCompletionPredecessorHint resource provides hints for the learning activity predecessor when sequencing is enabled.

activityContentAttempts.title: Activity Content Attempts
activityContentAttempts.description: The activityContentAttempts resource provides the content and attempts details of the parent learning item type. Content details include content identifier, content number, and content type. Attempts details include activity identifier, activity number, start date, and end date.

activityContentDisplayMode.description: Determines how learners see the content, such as embedded.

activityCoverArtLink.title: Activity Cover Art Link
activityCoverArtLink.description: URL to open the cover art directly from the browser.

activityDate.title: Activity Date
activityDate.description: Date when the ILT activity is worked on. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.

activityDescriptionLong.description: Long description of the learning activity.

activityDisplayOrder.title: Activity Position
activityDisplayOrder.description: Display order for the learning activities.

activityEffortUnits.title: Activity Effort Units
activityEffortUnits.description: Unit used to measure the effort required to complete the learning activity, such as hour, minute, or month. Valid values are defined in the ActivityExpectedEffortUnitsLOV list.

activityEffortUnitsMeaning.title: Activity Effort Units Description
activityEffortUnitsMeaning.description: Description of the learning activity effort units.

activityEndDatetimeUTC.title: Activity End Date
activityEndDatetimeUTC.description: Learning activity end time expressed in UTC format.

activityEndTime.title: Activity End Time
activityEndTime.description: ILT activity end time in the user's preferred time zone. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.

activityExpectedEffort.title: Expected Effort
activityExpectedEffort.description: Expected effort for the learning activity.

activityId.title: Activity ID
activityId.description: Application-generated primary key of the learning activity.

activityLearnerMarkCompl.title: Learner Can Mark Activity Complete
activityLearnerMarkCompl.description: Indicates whether the learner can mark the activity as completed.

activityLearnerRecordAttendance.description: Indicates whether learners can record their attendance for an activity.

activityNumber.title: Activity Number
activityNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the learning activity in the user interface.

activityPassingScore.title: Passing Score
activityPassingScore.description: Passing score for the learning activity.

activitySecComplRequired.title: Activity Section Required Activities
activitySecComplRequired.description: Completion requirement for the learning activity section.

activitySectionAttemptCompletionProgress.title: Activity Section Attempt Completion Progress
activitySectionAttemptCompletionProgress.description: Number of learning activities completed in a section.

activitySectionAttemptLocked.title: Activity Section Attempt Locked
activitySectionAttemptLocked.description: Indicates whether the attempt on the learning activity section is locked. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is N.

activitySectionAttemptStatus.title: Activity Section Attempt Status
activitySectionAttemptStatus.description: Status of the attempt on the learning activity section. Valid values are defined in the learning activitySectionAttemptStatusLOV list.

activitySectionAttemptStatusMeaning.title: Activity Section Attempt Status Description
activitySectionAttemptStatusMeaning.description: Description of the activitySectionAttemptStatus attribute value.

activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Section Completion Predecessor Hints
activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint provides hints for the predecessor of the learning activity section when sequencing is enabled.

activitySectionDescription.title: Activity Section Description
activitySectionDescription.description: Description of the learning activity section.

activitySectionDisplayOrder.title: Activity Section Position
activitySectionDisplayOrder.description: Display order for the learning activity section.

activitySectionLongDescription.title: Long Description
activitySectionLongDescription.description: Long description of the learning activity.

activitySectionNumber.title: Activity Section Number
activitySectionNumber.description: Number identifying the learning activity section.

activitySectionTitle.title: Activity Section Title
activitySectionTitle.description: Name of the learning activity section.

activitySectionTotalActivities.title: Activity Section Total Activities
activitySectionTotalActivities.description: Total number of learning activities in the section.

activityShortDescription.title: Activity Short Description
activityShortDescription.description: Description of the learning content activity.

activityShortTimeZone.title: Activity Time Zone
activityShortTimeZone.description: Friendly format for the time zone.

activityStartDatetimeUTC.title: Activity Start Date
activityStartDatetimeUTC.description: Learning activity start time expressed in UTC format.

activityStartTime.title: Activity Start Time
activityStartTime.description: ILT activity start time in the user's preferred time zone. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.

activityTimeZone.title: Activity Time Zone
activityTimeZone.description: ILT activity time zone. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.

activityTotalAttempts.title: Activity Total Attempts
activityTotalAttempts.description: Total learner attempts on the activity.

activityType.title: Activity Type
activityType.description: Activity type of the learning assignment. If the learning assignment is for specialization, this represents a course. If the learning assignment is for a course, this represents offering types. Valid values are defined in the ActivityTypeLOV list.

activityTypeMeaning.title: Activity Type Description
activityTypeMeaning.description: Description of the learning activity type.

addToCalendarLink.title: Add to Calendar Link
addToCalendarLink.description: Link to download the .ics file to add the ILT activity to the calendar. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.

allowFwdScrub.title: Allow learners to fast forward
allowFwdScrub.description: Indicates if forward scrubbing is enabled.Valid values are Y or N.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.description: The classrooms resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the classroom details for the instructor-led activities associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

completionItemId.description: Application-generated primary key of the completion item.

completionItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying for identifying the completion item.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

dataSecurityPrivilegeMeaning.title: Data Security Privilege Description
dataSecurityPrivilegeMeaning.description: Description of the value of the dataSecurityPrivilege attribute.

eLearnMarkCompletionOnOpen.title: eLearning Mark Completion on Open
eLearnMarkCompletionOnOpen.description: Indicates whether to set the eLearning to complete when it's opened.

elearnAttemptReview.title: eLearning Attempt Review
elearnAttemptReview.description: Indicates whether the learner can review the activity attempt. Valid values are ORA_WLF_ARAR_LAST_ATTEMPT, ORA_WLF_ARAR_DONT_ENABLE and are defined in the ELearnAttemptReviewLOV list.

elearnAttemptReviewMeaning.title: eLearning Attempt Review Description
elearnAttemptReviewMeaning.description: Description of the elearnAttemptReview attribute value.

elearnAttemptsAllowed.title: eLearning Attempts Allowed
elearnAttemptsAllowed.description: Maximum number of attempts allowed on the self-paced learning assessment activity.

elearnAutoLaunchOnPageOpen.description: Indicates whether the content needs to be automatically launched when the enrollment page opens.

elearnCoverArtLink.title: eLearning Cover Art Link
elearnCoverArtLink.description: URL to open the eLearning cover art directly from the browser.

elearnDisableContentReview.title: eLearning Disable Content Review
elearnDisableContentReview.description: Indicates whether the content review is disabled for the self-paced learning activity. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is N for self-paced learning activity with content type such as Video, PDF, Web link, SCORM or HACP.

elearnDisableReview.title: eLearning Disable Review
elearnDisableReview.description: Indicates whether to disable reviews for the self-paced learning activity.

elearnDisableReviewForPassedAttempts.title: eLearning Disable Review for Passed Attempts
elearnDisableReviewForPassedAttempts.description: Indicates whether the review of passed attempts is disabled for the self-paced learning activity. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is Y.

help.instruction: eLearning Disable Review for Passed Attempts

elearnHideActualScore.title: eLearning Hide Actual Score
elearnHideActualScore.description: Indicates whether to hide the score for the self-paced learning activity.

elearnId.title: eLearning ID
elearnId.description: Application-generated primary key for the eLearning content of the self-paced activity.

elearnNumber.title: eLearning Number
elearnNumber.description: Number for identifying the content that backs the self-paced learning activity.

elearnQuestionnaireId.title: Questionnaire ID
elearnQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the questionnaire that's the self-paced learning assessment activity.

elearnQuestionnaireNumber.title: Questionnaire Number
elearnQuestionnaireNumber.description: Question number of a question in the eLearning.

elearnRecordedAttemptsRule.title: eLearning Recorded Attempts Rule
elearnRecordedAttemptsRule.description: Rule for the maximum number of attempts allowed for the self-paced learning activity. Valid values are ORA_WLF_ARA_SNGL, ORA_WLF_ARA_LTD_NUM, ORA_WLF_ARA_UNLTD and are defined in the ELearnRecordedAttemptsRuleLOV list.

elearnRecordedAttemptsRuleMeaning.title: eLearning Recorded Attempts Rule Description
elearnRecordedAttemptsRuleMeaning.description: Description of the elearnRecordedAttemptsRule attribute value.

elearnRichMediaLink.title: eLearning Rich Media Link
elearnRichMediaLink.description: URL to open the video directly from the browser.

elearnRichMediaSrcLink.title: eLearning Rich Media Source Link
elearnRichMediaSrcLink.description: Link to the rich media source file.

elearnShortDescription.title: eLearning Description
elearnShortDescription.description: Description of the learning content for the self-paced activity.

elearnShowResponseFeedback.title: eLearning Show Response Feedback
elearnShowResponseFeedback.description: Show response feedback for the self-paced learning activity.

elearnTimePERAttempt.title: eLearning Time per Attempt
elearnTimePERAttempt.description: Time limit per attempt on the self-paced learning assessment activity.

elearnTimePERAttemptUnits.title: eLearning Time per Attempt Units
elearnTimePERAttemptUnits.description: Unit of measure for the time limit per attempt on the self-paced learning assessment activity, such as Hours or Minutes. Valid values are defined in the ELearnTimePerAttemptUnitsLOV list.

elearnTimePERAttemptUnitsMeaning.title: eLearning Time per Attempt Units Description
elearnTimePERAttemptUnitsMeaning.description: Description of the elearnTimePERAttemptUnitsMeaning attribute value.

help.instruction: eLearning Time per Attempt Units Description

elearnTitle.title: eLearning Title
elearnTitle.description: Name of the learning content for the self-paced activity.

elearnType.title: eLearning Type
elearnType.description: Type of the self-paced learning, such as Video or SCORM. Valid values are defined in the LearnningContentTypeLOV list.

elearnTypeMeaning.title: eLearning Type Description
elearnTypeMeaning.description: Description of the elearnTypeMeaning attribute value.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.description: The instructors resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the instructors associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

links.title: Links
links.description: The link relations associated with the resource instance.

offeredLanguages.title: Offered Languages
offeredLanguages.description: The offeredLanguages resource provides the offering language for a learning item.

offeredLocations.title: Offered Locations
offeredLocations.description: The offeredLocations resource provides the location details for a learning item.

parentLearningItemSubType.title: Parent Assigned Learning Item Subtype
parentLearningItemSubType.description: Learning item subtype, such as Video or Tutorial. Valid values are defined in the AssignedLearningItemSubTypeLOV list.

parentLearningItemSubTypeMeaning.title: Parent Assigned Learning Item Subtype Description
parentLearningItemSubTypeMeaning.description: Description of the attribute learningItemSubType attribute value.

help.instruction: Parent Assigned Learning Item Subtype Description

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

relatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
relatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

sectionAttemptComplDate.title: Activity Section Completion Date
sectionAttemptComplDate.description: Date when the learner successfully completed the learning activity section.

virtualClassroomInformation.title: Virtual Classroom Information
virtualClassroomInformation.description: Additional information about the virtual classroom, if used in the learning activity.

virtualClassroomJoinLink.title: Virtual Classroom Join Link
virtualClassroomJoinLink.description: Link to join the virtual classroom, if used in the ILT activity. Doesn't apply to any other types of activities.

virtualClassroomType.title: Virtual Classroom Type
virtualClassroomType.description: Type of the virtual classroom, such as ad-hoc virtual classroom, named virtual classroom, or no virtual classroom. Valid values are defined in the VirtualClassroomTypeLOV list.

virtualClassroomTypeMeaning.title: Virtual Classroom Type Description
virtualClassroomTypeMeaning.description: Description of the virtual classroom type.

activityAttemptAssignedToType.title: Activity Predecessor Attempt Assignee Type
activityAttemptAssignedToType.description: Type of user, such as Learner or Observer, assigned to the activity attempt. Valid values are defined in the ActivityAttemptAssignedToTypeLOV list.

activityAttemptAssignedToTypeMeaning.title: Activity Predecessor Attempt Assignee Type Description
activityAttemptAssignedToTypeMeaning.description: Description of the type of user assigned to the learning activity attempt.

help.instruction: Activity Predecessor Attempt Assignee Type Description

activityAttemptLocked.title: Activity Predecessor Attempt Locked
activityAttemptLocked.description: Indicates whether the learner can attempt the activity. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is N.

activityAttemptNumber.title: Activity Predecessor Attempt Number
activityAttemptNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the learning activity attempt.

activityAttemptStatus.title: Activity Predecessor Attempt Status
activityAttemptStatus.description: Status for the learning activity attempt. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is N. Valid values are defined in the learning activityAttemptStatusLOV list.

activityNumber.title: Activity Predecessor Number
activityNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the learning activity.

links.title: Links
links.description: The link relations associated with the resource instance.

activityContentAttemptStatus.title: Content Attempt Status
activityContentAttemptStatus.description: Status for the content attempt. Possible values are Complete, Exempted, Incomplete, and Not Completed.

actualEffort.title: Actual Effort
actualEffort.description: Quantity for the learner effort spent in the attempt.

actualEffortUnits.title: Actual Effort Units
actualEffortUnits.description: Unit of measure, such as hours or minutes, for the learner effort spent in the attempt.

actualEffortUnitsMeaning.title: Actual Effort Units Description
actualEffortUnitsMeaning.description: Description of the actualEffortUnits attribute value.

attemptId.title: Attempt ID
attemptId.description: Unique identifier for the self-paced learning activity or tutorial content attempt.

attemptPosition.title: Attempt Position
attemptPosition.description: Learner attempt position in the activity.

attemptRelationNumber.title: Attempt Relation Number
attemptRelationNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the association between the learning activity attempt and attempt on the self-paced learning activity.

attemptStatus.title: Last Attempt Status
attemptStatus.description: Status for the learning activity content attempt. Valid values are defined in the AttemptStatusLOV list.

attemptStatusMeaning.title: Last Attempt Status Description
attemptStatusMeaning.description: Description of the attemptStatus attribute value.

attemptedByDisplayName.title: Attempted By
attemptedByDisplayName.description: Display name for the person who attempted the self-paced learning activity.

attemptedById.title: Attempted by Person ID
attemptedById.description: Unique identifier for the person who attempted the self-paced learning activity.

attemptedByNumber.title: Attempted by Person Number
attemptedByNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the person who attempted the self-paced learning activity.

chapterLevel.title: Chapter Level
chapterLevel.description: Chapter level of the activity content.

chapterPosition.title: Chapter Position
chapterPosition.description: Position of the chapter in the activity.

contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link
contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.description: Data link to the catalog learning item added to the activity.

contentCatalogLearningItemId.title: Content Catalog Learning Item ID
contentCatalogLearningItemId.description: Unique identifier for the catalog learning item added to the activity.

contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Number
contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the catalog learning item added to the activity. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

contentCatalogLearningItemSubType.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Subtype
contentCatalogLearningItemSubType.description: Learning item subtype for the catalog learning item added to the activity.

contentCatalogLearningItemType.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Type
contentCatalogLearningItemType.description: Learning item type for the catalog learning item added to the activity.

contentCoverArtLink.title: Content Cover Art Link
contentCoverArtLink.description: URL to open the eLearning content cover art directly from the browser.

contentId.title: Content ID
contentId.description: Unique identifier for the eLearning content.

contentLongDescription.title: Content Long Description
contentLongDescription.description: Long description of the learning activity content.

contentNumber.title: Content Number
contentNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the learning activity content.

contentShortDescription.title: Content Short Description
contentShortDescription.description: Short description of the activity content.

contentType.title: Content Type
contentType.description: Type of content, such as SCORM, HACP, VIDEO, or Tutorial. Valid values are defined in the ContentTypeLOV list.

contentTypeMeaning.title: Content Type Description
contentTypeMeaning.description: Description of the contentType attribute value.

contentURL.title: Content URL
contentURL.description: URL to open the eLearning content directly from the browser.

effortUnits.title: Effort Units
effortUnits.description: Unit of measure for the expected effort.

elearnQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the questionnaire that's the self-paced assessment learning activity.

elearnRichMediaLink.description: URL to open the video directly from the browser.

elearnRichMediaSrcLink.title: eLearning Rich Media Source Link
elearnRichMediaSrcLink.description: Source URL for the eLearning activity.

expectedEffort.title: Expected Effort
expectedEffort.description: Learner effort required to complete the activity content.

links.title: Links
links.description: The link relations associated with the resource instance.

passingScore.title: Passing Score
passingScore.description: Score required to pass the activity content.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

AttemptNumber.title: Attempt Number
AttemptNumber.description: The attempt number of a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

CreatedBy.title: Created By
CreatedBy.description: User who created the questionnaire response.

CreationDate.title: Creation Date
CreationDate.description: Date on which the questionnaire response was created.

LastUpdateDate.title: Last Updated Date
LastUpdateDate.description: Date on which the questionnaire response was updated.

LastUpdatedBy.title: Last Updated By
LastUpdatedBy.description: User who last updated the questionnaire response.

LatestAttemptFlag.title: Latest Attempt
LatestAttemptFlag.description: Indicates if the response is the latest attempt by a participant to the questionnaire. This is a read-only attribute.

QuestionnaireParticipantId.title: Questionnaire Participant Id
QuestionnaireParticipantId.description: Surrogate identifier for the questionnaire participant.

QuestionnaireResponseId.title: Questionnaire Response Id
QuestionnaireResponseId.description: Surrogate identifier for the questionnaire response.

QuestionnaireVersionNumber.title: Questionnaire Version
QuestionnaireVersionNumber.description: Version number of the questionnaire that the participant responds to.

Status.title: Response Status Code
Status.description: Status of the questionnaire response. I denotes the response is in progress and not submitted yet, while S denotes a submitted response.

SubmittedDateTime.title: Submitted Time
SubmittedDateTime.description: Date on which the questionnaire response was submitted.

TotalScore.title: Total Score
TotalScore.description: Total score for the responses submitted by a participant for a questionnaire.

links.title: Links
links.description: The link relations associated with the resource instance.

questionResponses.title: Question Responses
questionResponses.description: The questionResponses resource is a child of the questionnaireResponses resource. It includes responses to specific questions within a questionnaire.

AnswerCode.title: Answer Code
AnswerCode.description: The answer code that a participant chose when responding to a single choice question.

AnswerCodeList.title: Answer Code List
AnswerCodeList.description: Concatenated list of answer choices, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which is selected by the participant when responding to a multiple choice question.

AnswerComments.title: Comments
AnswerComments.description: Additional comments provided by the participant when responding to a question.

AnswerLargeObject.title: Answer
AnswerLargeObject.description: Attachment provided by the participant when responding to a question.

AnswerList.title: Answer List
AnswerList.description: Concatenated list of answer identifiers, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which is selected by the participant when responding to a multiple choice question.

AnswerShortDescriptionList.description: Concatenated list of answer texts, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which is selected by the participant when responding to a multiple choice question.

AnswerShortdescription.title: Answer Short Description
AnswerShortdescription.description: Text of the answer chosen by a participant when responding to a single choice question.

ChoiceCodeList.title: Choice List Code
ChoiceCodeList.description: Concatenated list of answer codes, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which are presented to the participant when responding to a question enabled for random order responses.

ChoiceList.title: Choice List
ChoiceList.description: Concatenated list of answer identifiers, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which are presented to the participant when responding to a question enabled for random order responses.

LastUpdatedBy.description: User who last updated the question response.

QuestionAnswerId.description: Surrogate identifier of the answer that a participant chose when responding to a single choice question.

QuestionCode.description: Alphanumeric value that uniquely identifies a question defined for a subscriber.

QuestionnaireQuestionId.description: Surrogate identifier for the question in a questionnaire.

transactionCurrency.description: Learning transaction history item type currency. Valid values are defined in the PriceCurrencyLOVVA list.

transactionDate.title: Transaction Date
transactionDate.description: Transaction history date when the learning item was assigned.

transactionId.title: Transaction ID
transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the transaction history that the learning item was assigned to.

transactionNumber.description: Transaction history number for the learner assigned to the learning item.

transactionReason.description: Learning transaction history item reason. Valid values are defined in the ReasonLOV list.

transactionReasonMeaning.description: Description of the transactionReason attribute value.

transactionType.title: Transaction Type
transactionType.description: Transaction history item type for the learning item. Valid values are defined in the TransactionTypeLOV list.

transactionTypeMeaning.title: Transaction Type Description
transactionTypeMeaning.description: Description of the transactionType attribute value.

activityLearnerMarkCompl.description: Indicates whether the learner can mark the activity as complete. Valid values are Y and N. Default value is N.

allowRetry.description: Hint to identify whether a learner can retry the content or not. Y indicates that the learner is allowed to retry. N indicates that the learner isn't allowed to retry. Null indicates that this hint isn't applicable.

canEditAssignmentHint.title: Can Edit Assignment Hint
canEditAssignmentHint.description: Hint to identify whether a user can edit the assignment. Examples include Can delete, Can withdraw, and No edit. Valid values are defined in the CanEditAssignmentHintLOV.

canManageLearningItem.title: Can Manage Learning Item
canManageLearningItem.description: Hint to identify whether a user can manage the learning item.

canRetakeLearningItem.description: Indicates whether the learner can retake the learning item.Valid values are Y and N.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

activityAttemptStatus.description: Status for the activity the learner is working on. Content details include content identifier, content number, and content type. Attempts details include activity identifier, activity number, start date, and end date.

instructors.title: Instructors

offeredLocations.title: Offered Locations
offeredLocations.description: The offeredLocations resource provides the location details for a learning item.

otherSelectedCourseOfferings.title: Other Selected Course Offerings
otherSelectedCourseOfferings.description: The selectedCourseOfferings resource provides all offerings of an assigned course. This resource is applicable for only courses. It's empty for all other types of learning.

primarySelectedCourseOffering.description: The selectedCourseOfferings resource provides all offerings of an assigned course. This resource is applicable for only courses. It's empty for all other types of learning.

selectedCourseOfferings.title: Selected Course Offerings

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager, that identifies the intent and permissions for the person accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the list DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV.

activeDate.title: Offering Active Date
activeDate.description: Date when the learning assignment moved to an active status.

assignerAttributionType.title: Assigner Attribution Type
assignerAttributionType.description: Entity type for the learning assignment creator, such as person, specialist, or community. Valid values are defined in the AssignerToAttributionTypeLOV list.

assignmentDueDate.title: Due Date
assignmentDueDate.description: Due date for the other selected course offering assignment.

assignmentJustification.title: Justification
assignmentJustification.description: Justification provided by the specialist when assigning, or the learner when enrolling in, a course offering assignment.

assignmentStatus.description: Status for the learning enrollment, such as Active, Content Completed, Completed, Withdrawn, or Deleted. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentStatusLOV list.

canEditAssignmentHint.title: Can Edit Assignment Hint
canEditAssignmentHint.description: Assignment hint, such as Can delete, Can withdraw, or No edit, for the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the CanEditAssignmentHintLOV list.

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

enrollmentQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the learning enrollment questionnaire.

enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Entered Pending Seat Acceptance

exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Exited Pending Seat Acceptance

learningItemRatingDetails.title: Learning Item Rating Details

learningItemType.title: Assigned Learning Item Type

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: The messages resource provides the message text, code, and severity of the messages displayed for the learning item.

primaryClassroomType.title: Offering Primary Classroom Type

questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

reasonCode.title: Status Change Reason Code

requestedCompleteByDate.title: Request Completion Date

requestedStartDate.title: Enrolled on Date
requestedStartDate.description: Request start date specified for the selected learning offering assignment.

statusChangeComment.title: Comments

activeDate.title: Offering Active Date
activeDate.description: Date when the learning assignment moved to an active status.

assignerAttributionType.title: Assigner Attribution Type
assignerAttributionType.description: Entity type for the learning assignment creator, such as person, specialist, or community. Valid values are defined in the AssignerToAttributionTypeLOV list.

assignmentDueDate.title: Due Date
assignmentDueDate.description: Due date for the other selected course offering assignment.

assignmentJustification.title: Justification
assignmentJustification.description: Justification provided by the specialist when assigning, or the learner when enrolling in, a course offering assignment.

assignmentStatus.title: Enrollment Record Status
assignmentStatus.description: Status for the learning enrollment, such as Active, Content Completed, Completed, Withdrawn, or Deleted. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentStatusLOV list.

canEditAssignmentHint.title: Can Edit Assignment Hint
canEditAssignmentHint.description: Assignment hint, such as Can delete, Can withdraw, or No edit, for the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the CanEditAssignmentHintLOV list.

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

enrollmentHistory.title: Enrollment History
enrollmentHistory.description: The enrollmentHistory resource provides the enrollment history details for the learning assignment.

enrollmentQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the learning enrollment questionnaire.

enrollmentRelatedMaterials.title: Enrollment Related Materials
enrollmentRelatedMaterials.description: The attachments resource provides the related learning materials for the parent resource.

enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Entered Pending Seat Acceptance
enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment entered the pending seat acceptance status.

exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Exited Pending Seat Acceptance
exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment exited the pending seat acceptance status.

learningItemRatingDetails.title: Learning Item Rating Details
learningItemRatingDetails.description: The learningItemRatingDetails resource provides the rating details for it's parent resource. Details include rating identifier, comments, and status.

learningItemRelatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
learningItemRelatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

learningItemType.title: Assigned Learning Item Type
learningItemType.description: Learning item type, such as Course, Specialization, Tutorial, or Video. Valid values are defined in theAssignedLearningItemTypeLOV list.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: The messages resource provides the message text, code, and severity of the messages displayed for the learning item.

primaryClassroomType.title: Offering Primary Classroom Type
primaryClassroomType.description: Primary classroom type, such as Physical Classroom, Virtual Classroom, or No Location Defined.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

reasonCode.title: Status Change Reason Code
reasonCode.description: Reason code for the other selected course offering assignment. Valid values are defined in the ReasonCodeLOV list.

requestedCompleteByDate.title: Request Completion Date
requestedCompleteByDate.description: Learning request completion by date specified on the past renewal assignment for the selected course offering.

requestedStartDate.title: Enrolled on Date
requestedStartDate.description: Request start date specified for the selected learning offering assignment.

statusChangeComment.title: Comments
statusChangeComment.description: Status change comment for the other selected learning course offering.

transactionHistory.title: Transaction Histories
transactionHistory.description: The transactionHistory resource provides the transaction history for its parent resource. Details include transaction identifier, transaction number, transaction date, and transaction reason.

activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.title: Activity Attempt Exempted Reason Code
activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.description: Reason code for completion of a learning activity attempt.

activityAttemptStatus.title: Activity Attempt Status
activityAttemptStatus.description: Status for the activity the learner is working on. Valid values include ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, and ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS. Valid value are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.

activityCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Completion Predecessor Hints
activityCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activityCompletionPredecessorHint resource provides hints for the learning activity predecessor when sequencing is enabled.

activityContentAttempts.title: Activity Content Attempts
activityContentAttempts.description: The activityContentAttempts resource provides the content and attempts details of the parent learning item type. Content details include content identifier, content number, and content type. Attempts details include activity identifier, activity number, start date, and end date.

activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Section Completion Predecessor Hints
activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint provides hints for the predecessor of the learning activity section when sequencing is enabled.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.description: The classrooms resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the classroom details for the instructor-led activities associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.description: The instructors resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the instructors associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

offeredLanguages.title: Offered Languages
offeredLanguages.description: The offeredLanguages resource provides the offering language for a learning item.

offeredLocations.title: Offered Locations
offeredLocations.description: The offeredLocations resource provides the location details for a learning item.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

relatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
relatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

actualEffort.title: Actual Effort
actualEffort.description: Quantity for the learner effort spent in the attempt.

contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link
contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.description: Data link to the catalog learning item added to the activity.

help.instruction: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link

contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Number
contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the catalog learning item added to the activity. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

contentURL.title: Content URL
contentURL.description: URL to open the eLearning content directly from the browser.

elearnQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the questionnaire that's the self-paced assessment learning activity.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

QuestionnaireVersionNumber.description: Version number of the questionnaire that the participant responds to.

activeDate.title: Offering Active Date
activeDate.description: Date when the learning assignment moved to an active status.

activeLearnerComments.title: Active Learner Comments
activeLearnerComments.description: The comments resource provides details of all comments by active and completed learners for the learning item.

approvalDetails.title: Approval Details
approvalDetails.description: The approvalDetails resource provides the approval details for the learning assignment.

assignerAttributionType.title: Assigner Attribution Type
assignerAttributionType.description: Entity type for the learning assignment creator, such as person, specialist, or community. Valid values are defined in the AssignerToAttributionTypeLOV list.

assignerPersonDetails.title: Assigner Person Details
assignerPersonDetails.description: The personDetalis resource provides details about the person associated with the learning item.

assignmentDueDate.title: Due Date
assignmentDueDate.description: Due date for the other selected course offering assignment.

assignmentJustification.title: Justification
assignmentJustification.description: Justification provided by the specialist when assigning, or the learner when enrolling in, a course offering assignment.

assignmentStatus.title: Enrollment Record Status
assignmentStatus.description: Status for the learning enrollment, such as Active, Content Completed, Completed, Withdrawn, or Deleted. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentStatusLOV list.

canEditAssignmentHint.title: Can Edit Assignment Hint
canEditAssignmentHint.description: Assignment hint, such as Can delete, Can withdraw, or No edit, for the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the CanEditAssignmentHintLOV list.

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

enrollmentHistory.title: Enrollment History
enrollmentHistory.description: The enrollmentHistory resource provides the enrollment history details for the learning assignment.

enrollmentQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the learning enrollment questionnaire.

enrollmentRelatedMaterials.title: Enrollment Related Materials
enrollmentRelatedMaterials.description: The attachments resource provides the related learning materials for the parent resource.

enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Entered Pending Seat Acceptance
enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment entered the pending seat acceptance status.

errors.title: Errors
errors.description: The errors resource provides a list of all the errors that exist on it's parent resource. Details include error identifier, error code, and error category.

exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Exited Pending Seat Acceptance
exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment exited the pending seat acceptance status.

learningItemRatingDetails.title: Learning Item Rating Details
learningItemRatingDetails.description: The learningItemRatingDetails resource provides the rating details for it's parent resource. Details include rating identifier, comments, and status.

learningItemRelatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
learningItemRelatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

learningItemType.title: Assigned Learning Item Type
learningItemType.description: Learning item type, such as Course, Specialization, Tutorial, or Video. Valid values are defined in theAssignedLearningItemTypeLOV list.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: The messages resource provides the message text, code, and severity of the messages displayed for the learning item.

offeringPrimaryClassroom.title: Offering Primary Classrooms
offeringPrimaryClassroom.description: The offeringPrimaryClassroom resource provides primary classroom details for the ILT or blended learning offering.

offeringPrimaryInstructor.title: Offering Primary Instructors
offeringPrimaryInstructor.description: The offeringPrimaryInstructor resource provides the details for the primary instructor of the learning offering. Details include instructor identifier, display name, and email address

primaryClassroomType.title: Offering Primary Classroom Type
primaryClassroomType.description: Primary classroom type, such as Physical Classroom, Virtual Classroom, or No Location Defined.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

reasonCode.title: Status Change Reason Code
reasonCode.description: Reason code for the other selected course offering assignment. Valid values are defined in the ReasonCodeLOV list.

requestedCompleteByDate.title: Request Completion Date
requestedCompleteByDate.description: Learning request completion by date specified on the past renewal assignment for the selected course offering.

requestedStartDate.title: Enrolled on Date
requestedStartDate.description: Request start date specified for the selected learning offering assignment.

statusChangeComment.title: Comments
statusChangeComment.description: Status change comment for the other selected learning course offering.

transactionHistory.title: Transaction Histories
transactionHistory.description: The transactionHistory resource provides the transaction history for its parent resource. Details include transaction identifier, transaction number, transaction date, and transaction reason.

userActionHints.title: User Action Hints
userActionHints.description: The userActionHints resource provides hints for possible actions on a learner's assignment records.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description: The attachments resource is used to view, create, and update attachments.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: Learner comment in conversations for active and completed learning item learners.

commentStatus.title: Comment Status
commentStatus.description: Learner comment status in conversations for active and completed learning item learners. Valid values are defined in the CommentStatusLOV list.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

likes.title: Likes
likes.description: The likes resource provides details of the likes for comments by active and completed learners for the learning item.

replies.title: Replies
replies.description: The replies resource provides details of the replies to comments by active and completed learners for the learning item.

likeStatus.description: Status for the comment like. Valid values are defined in the LikeStatusLOV list.

attachments.description: The attachments resource is used to view, create, and update attachments.

dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

likes.title: Likes
likes.description: The likes resource provides details of the likes for comments by active and completed learners for the learning item.

replyStatus.title: Reply Status
replyStatus.description: Status of the reply to a comment. Valid values are defined in the ReplyStatusLOV list.
