likeStatus.title: Like Status
likeStatus.description: Status for the comment like. Valid values are defined in the LikeStatusLOV list.

approvalOutcome.title: Approval Outcome
approvalOutcome.description: Approval outcome, such as Approve or Reject. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentApprovalOutcomeLOV list.

approverActionDate.title: Approver Action Date
approverActionDate.description: Date when the approver took action on the learning enrollment approval request.

approverComments.title: Approver Comments
approverComments.description: Approver comments for the learning enrollment.

approverDisplayName.title: Approver Display Name
approverDisplayName.description: Display name for the learning enrollment approver.

approverPrimaryEmailAddress.title: Approver Primary Email Address
approverPrimaryEmailAddress.description: Primary email address for the learning enrollment approver.

approverUserName.title: Approver User Name
approverUserName.description: User name for the learning enrollment approver.

assignedToApproverDate.title: Assigned to Approver Date
assignedToApproverDate.description: Date when the learning assignment approval request was assigned to the approver.

assignmentRecordId.title: Enrollment Record ID
assignmentRecordId.description: Unique identifier for the learning enrollment.

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of approval, such as Learning Request, Learning Assignment Withdrawal. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentApprovalTypeLOV list.

worklistTaskDisplayURL.title: Worklist Task Display URL
worklistTaskDisplayURL.description: URL to open the worklist task directly from the browser.

activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.title: Activity Attempt Exempted Reason Code
activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.description: Reason code for completion of a learning activity attempt.

activityAttemptStatus.title: Activity Attempt Status
activityAttemptStatus.description: Status for the activity the learner is working on. Valid values include ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, and ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS. Valid value are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.

activityCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Completion Predecessor Hints
activityCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activityCompletionPredecessorHint resource provides hints for the learning activity predecessor when sequencing is enabled.

activityContentAttempts.title: Activity Content Attempts
activityContentAttempts.description: The activityContentAttempts resource provides the content and attempts details of the parent learning item type. Content details include content identifier, content number, and content type. Attempts details include activity identifier, activity number, start date, and end date.

activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Section Completion Predecessor Hints
activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint provides hints for the predecessor of the learning activity section when sequencing is enabled.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.description: The classrooms resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the classroom details for the instructor-led activities associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.description: The instructors resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the instructors associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

offeredLanguages.title: Offered Languages
offeredLanguages.description: The offeredLanguages resource provides the offering language for a learning item.

offeredLocations.title: Offered Locations
offeredLocations.description: The offeredLocations resource provides the location details for a learning item.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

relatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
relatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

actualEffort.title: Actual Effort
actualEffort.description: Quantity for the learner effort spent in the attempt.

contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link
contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.description: Data link to the catalog learning item added to the activity.

help.instruction: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link

contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Number
contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the catalog learning item added to the activity. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

contentURL.title: Content URL
contentURL.description: URL to open the eLearning content directly from the browser.

elearnQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the questionnaire that's the self-paced assessment learning activity.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

QuestionnaireVersionNumber.title: Questionnaire Version
QuestionnaireVersionNumber.description: Version number of the questionnaire that the participant responds to.

Status.title: Response Status Code
Status.description: Status of the questionnaire response. I denotes the response is in progress and not submitted yet, while S denotes a submitted response.

questionResponses.title: Question Responses
questionResponses.description: The questionResponses resource is a child of the questionnaireResponses resource. It includes responses to specific questions within a questionnaire.

AnswerCodeList.title: Answer Code List
AnswerCodeList.description: Concatenated list of answer choices, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which is selected by the participant when responding to a multiple choice question.

AnswerComments.title: Comments
AnswerComments.description: Additional comments provided by the participant when responding to a question.

AnswerLargeObject.title: Answer
AnswerLargeObject.description: Attachment provided by the participant when responding to a question.

AnswerList.title: Answer List
AnswerList.description: Concatenated list of answer identifiers, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which is selected by the participant when responding to a multiple choice question.

ChoiceCodeList.title: Choice List Code
ChoiceCodeList.description: Concatenated list of answer codes, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which are presented to the participant when responding to a question enabled for random order responses.

QuestionAnswerId.title: Question Answer Id
QuestionAnswerId.description: Surrogate identifier of the answer that a participant chose when responding to a single choice question.

questionResponseAttachments.title: Question Response Attachments
questionResponseAttachments.description: The questionResponseAttachments resource is a child of the questionResponses resource. It includes attachments added in response to a question.

count.description: The number of resource instances returned in the current range.

hasMore.description: Indicates whether more resources are available on the server than the subset returned in the response. If the value is true, then there are more resources to retrieve from the server. The default value is false.

limit.description: The actual paging size used by the server.

links.title: Links
links.description: The link relations associated with the resource instance.

offset.description: The offset value used in the current page.

activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.title: Activity Attempt Exempted Reason Code
activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.description: Reason code for completion of a learning activity attempt.

activityAttemptStatus.title: Activity Attempt Status
activityAttemptStatus.description: Status for the activity the learner is working on. Valid values include ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, and ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS. Valid value are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.

activityCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Completion Predecessor Hints
activityCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activityCompletionPredecessorHint resource provides hints for the learning activity predecessor when sequencing is enabled.

activityContentAttempts.title: Activity Content Attempts
activityContentAttempts.description: The activityContentAttempts resource provides the content and attempts details of the parent learning item type. Content details include content identifier, content number, and content type. Attempts details include activity identifier, activity number, start date, and end date.

activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Section Completion Predecessor Hints
activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint provides hints for the predecessor of the learning activity section when sequencing is enabled.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.description: The classrooms resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the classroom details for the instructor-led activities associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

elearnObsPersonDetails.title: Observer Person Details
elearnObsPersonDetails.description: The person details of each configured observer when an observation checklist is configured to use named observers.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.description: The instructors resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the instructors associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

learningItemTalentProfileSummary.title: Learning Item Talent Profile Summary
learningItemTalentProfileSummary.description: The summary learning information from the talent profile, such as if a course is configured with prerequisites or outcomes.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: The messages resource provides the message text, code, and severity of the messages displayed for the learning item.

offeredLanguages.title: Offered Languages
offeredLanguages.description: The offeredLanguages resource provides the offering language for a learning item.

offeredLocations.title: Offered Locations
offeredLocations.description: The offeredLocations resource provides the location details for a learning item.

otherSelectedCourseOfferings.title: Other Selected Course Offerings
otherSelectedCourseOfferings.description: The selectedCourseOfferings resource provides all offerings of an assigned course. This resource is applicable for only courses. It's empty for all other types of learning.

primarySelectedCourseOffering.title: Primary Selected Course Offering
primarySelectedCourseOffering.description: The selectedCourseOfferings resource provides all offerings of an assigned course. This resource is applicable for only courses. It's empty for all other types of learning.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

relatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
relatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

selectedCourseOfferings.title: Selected Course Offerings
selectedCourseOfferings.description: The selectedCourseOfferings resource provides all offerings of an assigned course. This resource is applicable for only courses. It's empty for all other types of learning.

userActionHints.title: User Action Hints
userActionHints.description: The userActionHints resource provides hints for possible actions on a learner's assignment records.

actualEffort.title: Actual Effort
actualEffort.description: Quantity for the learner effort spent in the attempt.

DmFolderPath.description: Folder path where the attachment will be created.

ErrorStatusMessage.title: Error Status Message
ErrorStatusMessage.description: Expiration date for the attachment. This is a read-only attribute.

ExpirationDate.title: Expiration Date
ExpirationDate.description: Expiration date of the attachment. This is a read-only attribute.

PostProcessingAction.title: PostProcessingAction
PostProcessingAction.description: Name of the action that can be done after an attachment is uploaded.

UploadedFileContentType.description: Content type of the uploaded file. This is a read-only attribute.

UploadedFileLength.title: File Size

UploadedFileName.title: Uploaded File Name
UploadedFileName.description: Name of the uploaded file. This is a read-only attribute.

Uri.title: Uri
Uri.description: URI for the attachment. This is a read-only attribute.

Url.title: Url
Url.description: URL for a web page type attachment.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager, that identifies the intent and permissions for the person accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the list DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV.

activeDate.title: Offering Active Date
activeDate.description: Date when the learning assignment moved to an active status.

assignedToId.title: Assignee Person ID
assignedToId.description: Unique identifier for the course offering assignee.

assignerAttributionType.title: Assigner Attribution Type
assignerAttributionType.description: Entity type for the learning assignment creator, such as person, specialist, or community. Valid values are defined in the AssignerToAttributionTypeLOV list.

assignerCommentsToLearner.title: Assigner Comments to Learner
assignerCommentsToLearner.description: Assigner comments for the other selected course offering.

assignmentDueDate.title: Due Date
assignmentDueDate.description: Due date for the other selected course offering assignment.

assignmentJustification.title: Justification
assignmentJustification.description: Justification provided by the specialist when assigning, or the learner when enrolling in, a course offering assignment.

assignmentStatus.title: Enrollment Record Status
assignmentStatus.description: Status for the learning enrollment, such as Active, Content Completed, Completed, Withdrawn, or Deleted. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentStatusLOV list.

assignmentType.title: Enrollment Type
assignmentType.description: Learning enrollment type for the other selected course offering, such as required or voluntary. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentTypeLOV list.

canEditAssignmentHint.title: Can Edit Assignment Hint
canEditAssignmentHint.description: Assignment hint, such as Can delete, Can withdraw, or No edit, for the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the CanEditAssignmentHintLOV list.

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

enrollmentHistory.title: Enrollment History
enrollmentHistory.description: The enrollmentHistory resource provides the enrollment history details for the learning assignment.

enrollmentQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the learning enrollment questionnaire.

enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Entered Pending Seat Acceptance
enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment entered the pending seat acceptance status.

errors.title: Errors
errors.description: The errors resource provides a list of all the errors that exist on it's parent resource. Details include error identifier, error code, and error category.

exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Exited Pending Seat Acceptance
exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment exited the pending seat acceptance status.

learningItemId.title: Assigned Learning Item ID
learningItemId.description: Unique identifier for the learning item, it's the internal primary key.

learningItemNumber.title: Assigned Learning Item Number
learningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the learning item. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

learningItemRatingDetails.title: Learning Item Rating Details
learningItemRatingDetails.description: The learningItemRatingDetails resource provides the rating details for it's parent resource. Details include rating identifier, comments, and status.

learningItemType.title: Assigned Learning Item Type
learningItemType.description: Learning item type, such as Course, Specialization, Tutorial, or Video. Valid values are defined in theAssignedLearningItemTypeLOV list.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: The messages resource provides the message text, code, and severity of the messages displayed for the learning item.

primaryClassroomType.title: Offering Primary Classroom Type
primaryClassroomType.description: Primary classroom type, such as Physical Classroom, Virtual Classroom, or No Location Defined.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

reasonCode.title: Status Change Reason Code
reasonCode.description: Reason code for the other selected course offering assignment. Valid values are defined in the ReasonCodeLOV list.

requestedCompleteByDate.title: Request Completion Date
requestedCompleteByDate.description: Learning request completion by date specified on the past renewal assignment for the selected course offering.

requestedStartDate.title: Enrolled on Date
requestedStartDate.description: Request start date specified for the selected learning offering assignment.

sourceId.title: Enrollment Source Identifier
sourceId.description: Unique identifier for the source where this assignment was created.

sourceType.title: Enrollment Source Type
sourceType.description: Type for the source where this assignment was created, such as Recommendation or Search.

statusChangeComment.title: Comments
statusChangeComment.description: Status change comment for the other selected learning course offering.

transactionHistory.title: Transaction Histories
transactionHistory.description: The transactionHistory resource provides the transaction history for its parent resource. Details include transaction identifier, transaction number, transaction date, and transaction reason.

activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.title: Activity Attempt Exempted Reason Code
activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.description: Reason code for completion of a learning activity attempt.

activityAttemptStatus.title: Activity Attempt Status
activityAttemptStatus.description: Status for the activity the learner is working on. Valid values include ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, and ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS. Valid value are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.

activityCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Completion Predecessor Hints
activityCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activityCompletionPredecessorHint resource provides hints for the learning activity predecessor when sequencing is enabled.

activityContentAttempts.title: Activity Content Attempts
activityContentAttempts.description: The activityContentAttempts resource provides the content and attempts details of the parent learning item type. Content details include content identifier, content number, and content type. Attempts details include activity identifier, activity number, start date, and end date.

activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Section Completion Predecessor Hints
activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint provides hints for the predecessor of the learning activity section when sequencing is enabled.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.description: The classrooms resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the classroom details for the instructor-led activities associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.description: The instructors resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the instructors associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

offeredLanguages.title: Offered Languages
offeredLanguages.description: The offeredLanguages resource provides the offering language for a learning item.

offeredLocations.title: Offered Locations
offeredLocations.description: The offeredLocations resource provides the location details for a learning item.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

relatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
relatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

actualEffort.title: Actual Effort
actualEffort.description: Quantity for the learner effort spent in the attempt.

contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link
contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.description: Data link to the catalog learning item added to the activity.

help.instruction: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link

contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Number
contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the catalog learning item added to the activity. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

contentURL.title: Content URL
contentURL.description: URL to open the eLearning content directly from the browser.

elearnQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the questionnaire that's the self-paced assessment learning activity.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

QuestionnaireParticipantId.title: Questionnaire Participant Id
QuestionnaireParticipantId.description: Surrogate identifier for the questionnaire participant.

QuestionnaireResponseId.title: Questionnaire Response Id
QuestionnaireResponseId.description: Surrogate identifier for the questionnaire response.

QuestionnaireVersionNumber.title: Questionnaire Version
QuestionnaireVersionNumber.description: Version number of the questionnaire that the participant responds to.

Status.title: Response Status Code
Status.description: Status of the questionnaire response. I denotes the response is in progress and not submitted yet, while S denotes a submitted response.

questionResponses.title: Question Responses
questionResponses.description: The questionResponses resource is a child of the questionnaireResponses resource. It includes responses to specific questions within a questionnaire.

AnswerCodeList.title: Answer Code List
AnswerCodeList.description: Concatenated list of answer choices, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which is selected by the participant when responding to a multiple choice question.

AnswerComments.title: Comments
AnswerComments.description: Additional comments provided by the participant when responding to a question.

AnswerLargeObject.description: Attachment provided by the participant when responding to a question.

AnswerList.description: Concatenated list of answer identifiers, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which is selected by the participant when responding to a multiple choice question.

ChoiceList.title: Choice List
ChoiceList.description: Concatenated list of answer identifiers, separated by a semicolon as a delimiter, which are presented to the participant when responding to a question enabled for random order responses.

QuestionAnswerId.description: Surrogate identifier of the answer that a participant chose when responding to a single choice question.

QuestionResponseId.description: Surrogate identifier for the question response.

QuestionnaireQuestionId.title: Questionnaire Question Id
QuestionnaireQuestionId.description: Surrogate identifier for the question in a questionnaire.

questionResponseAttachments.title: Question Response Attachments
questionResponseAttachments.description: The questionResponseAttachments resource is a child of the questionResponses resource. It includes attachments added in response to a question.

AsyncTrackerId.description: Attribute provided exclusively for the Attachment UI components to assist in uploading files.

completionProgress.title: Completion Progress
completionProgress.description: Learner progress to complete the learning assignment. For a course, it's the number of activities completed. For a specialization, it's the sum of all the completed courses. For tutorials, it's the sum of all the completed sections.

enrollmentHistoryOrderId.description: Display order for the learning enrollment history status message.

enrollmentHistoryStatusMessage.description: Status message to show to the user.

dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

ratedByPersonDetails.title: Rater Person Details
ratedByPersonDetails.description: The personDetalis resource provides details about the person associated with the learning item.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: The rating given on the learning item.

ratingByPersonId.title: Rated by Person ID

activeDate.title: Offering Active Date
activeDate.description: Date when the learning assignment moved to an active status.

assignedToId.title: Assignee Person ID
assignedToId.description: Unique identifier for the course offering assignee.

assignerAttributionType.title: Assigner Attribution Type
assignerAttributionType.description: Entity type for the learning assignment creator, such as person, specialist, or community. Valid values are defined in the AssignerToAttributionTypeLOV list.

assignerCommentsToLearner.title: Assigner Comments to Learner
assignerCommentsToLearner.description: Assigner comments for the other selected course offering.

assignmentDueDate.title: Due Date
assignmentDueDate.description: Due date for the other selected course offering assignment.

assignmentJustification.title: Justification
assignmentJustification.description: Justification provided by the specialist when assigning, or the learner when enrolling in, a course offering assignment.

assignmentStatus.title: Enrollment Record Status
assignmentStatus.description: Status for the learning enrollment, such as Active, Content Completed, Completed, Withdrawn, or Deleted. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentStatusLOV list.

assignmentType.title: Enrollment Type
assignmentType.description: Learning enrollment type for the other selected course offering, such as required or voluntary. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentTypeLOV list.

canEditAssignmentHint.title: Can Edit Assignment Hint
canEditAssignmentHint.description: Assignment hint, such as Can delete, Can withdraw, or No edit, for the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the CanEditAssignmentHintLOV list.

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

enrollmentHistory.title: Enrollment History
enrollmentHistory.description: The enrollmentHistory resource provides the enrollment history details for the learning assignment.

enrollmentQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the learning enrollment questionnaire.

enrollmentRelatedMaterials.title: Enrollment Related Materials
enrollmentRelatedMaterials.description: The attachments resource provides the related learning materials for the parent resource.

enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Entered Pending Seat Acceptance
enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment entered the pending seat acceptance status.

exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Exited Pending Seat Acceptance
exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment exited the pending seat acceptance status.

learningItemId.title: Assigned Learning Item ID
learningItemId.description: Unique identifier for the learning item, it's the internal primary key.

learningItemNumber.title: Assigned Learning Item Number
learningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the learning item. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

learningItemRatingDetails.title: Learning Item Rating Details
learningItemRatingDetails.description: The learningItemRatingDetails resource provides the rating details for it's parent resource. Details include rating identifier, comments, and status.

learningItemRelatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
learningItemRelatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

learningItemType.title: Assigned Learning Item Type
learningItemType.description: Learning item type, such as Course, Specialization, Tutorial, or Video. Valid values are defined in theAssignedLearningItemTypeLOV list.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: The messages resource provides the message text, code, and severity of the messages displayed for the learning item.

primaryClassroomType.title: Offering Primary Classroom Type
primaryClassroomType.description: Primary classroom type, such as Physical Classroom, Virtual Classroom, or No Location Defined.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

reasonCode.title: Status Change Reason Code
reasonCode.description: Reason code for the other selected course offering assignment. Valid values are defined in the ReasonCodeLOV list.

requestedCompleteByDate.title: Request Completion Date
requestedCompleteByDate.description: Learning request completion by date specified on the past renewal assignment for the selected course offering.

requestedStartDate.title: Enrolled on Date
requestedStartDate.description: Request start date specified for the selected learning offering assignment.

sourceId.title: Enrollment Source Identifier
sourceId.description: Unique identifier for the source where this assignment was created.

sourceType.title: Enrollment Source Type
sourceType.description: Type for the source where this assignment was created, such as Recommendation or Search.

statusChangeComment.title: Comments
statusChangeComment.description: Status change comment for the other selected learning course offering.

transactionHistory.title: Transaction Histories
transactionHistory.description: The transactionHistory resource provides the transaction history for its parent resource. Details include transaction identifier, transaction number, transaction date, and transaction reason.

activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.title: Activity Attempt Exempted Reason Code
activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.description: Reason code for completion of a learning activity attempt.

activityAttemptStatus.title: Activity Attempt Status
activityAttemptStatus.description: Status for the activity the learner is working on. Valid values include ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, and ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS. Valid value are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.

activityCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Completion Predecessor Hints
activityCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activityCompletionPredecessorHint resource provides hints for the learning activity predecessor when sequencing is enabled.

activityContentAttempts.title: Activity Content Attempts
activityContentAttempts.description: The activityContentAttempts resource provides the content and attempts details of the parent learning item type. Content details include content identifier, content number, and content type. Attempts details include activity identifier, activity number, start date, and end date.

activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Section Completion Predecessor Hints
activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint provides hints for the predecessor of the learning activity section when sequencing is enabled.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.description: The classrooms resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the classroom details for the instructor-led activities associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.description: The instructors resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the instructors associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

offeredLanguages.title: Offered Languages
offeredLanguages.description: The offeredLanguages resource provides the offering language for a learning item.

offeredLocations.title: Offered Locations
offeredLocations.description: The offeredLocations resource provides the location details for a learning item.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

relatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
relatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

actualEffort.title: Actual Effort
actualEffort.description: Quantity for the learner effort spent in the attempt.

contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link
contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.description: Data link to the catalog learning item added to the activity.

help.instruction: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link

contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Number
contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the catalog learning item added to the activity. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

contentURL.title: Content URL
contentURL.description: URL to open the eLearning content directly from the browser.

elearnQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the questionnaire that's the self-paced assessment learning activity.

assignerAttributionType.description: Entity type for the learning assignment creator, such as person, specialist, or community. Valid values are defined in the AssignerToAttributionTypeLOV list.

assignerCommentsToLearner.title: Assigner Comments to Learner
assignerCommentsToLearner.description: Assigner comments for the other selected course offering.

assignerPersonDetails.title: Assigner Person Details
assignerPersonDetails.description: The personDetalis resource provides details about the person associated with the learning item.

assignmentDueDate.title: Due Date
assignmentDueDate.description: Due date for the other selected course offering assignment.

assignmentJustification.title: Justification
assignmentJustification.description: Justification provided by the specialist when assigning, or the learner when enrolling in, a course offering assignment.

assignmentStatus.title: Enrollment Record Status
assignmentStatus.description: Status for the learning enrollment, such as Active, Content Completed, Completed, Withdrawn, or Deleted. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentStatusLOV list.

assignmentType.title: Enrollment Type
assignmentType.description: Learning enrollment type for the other selected course offering, such as required or voluntary. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentTypeLOV list.

canEditAssignmentHint.title: Can Edit Assignment Hint
canEditAssignmentHint.description: Assignment hint, such as Can delete, Can withdraw, or No edit, for the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the CanEditAssignmentHintLOV list.

completionDetails.title: Completion Details
completionDetails.description: The completionDetails resource provides completion details for the learner assignment when queried with the assignment record ID. It provides the completion details for all activities that a learner has completed or will complete. The provided details are equivalent to what learning administrators see on the Manage Activities page for a learning assignment.

completionSummary.title: Completion Summaries
completionSummary.description: The completionSummary resource is a child of the learnerLearningRecords resource. It provides a completion summary for a single learning assignment or a collection of assignments when queried with the assignment record ID. The summary includes completion requirements, the passing and actual scores, expected number of activities, effort for completion, and completion progress for the associated course offering.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

enrollmentHistory.title: Enrollment History
enrollmentHistory.description: The enrollmentHistory resource provides the enrollment history details for the learning assignment.

enrollmentQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the learning enrollment questionnaire.

enrollmentRelatedMaterials.title: Enrollment Related Materials
enrollmentRelatedMaterials.description: The attachments resource provides the related learning materials for the parent resource.

enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Entered Pending Seat Acceptance
enteredPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment entered the pending seat acceptance status.

errors.title: Errors
errors.description: The errors resource provides a list of all the errors that exist on it's parent resource. Details include error identifier, error code, and error category.

exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.title: Date Learning Item Exited Pending Seat Acceptance
exitedPendingSeatAcceptanceDate.description: Date when the learning assignment exited the pending seat acceptance status.

learningItemId.title: Assigned Learning Item ID
learningItemId.description: Unique identifier for the learning item, it's the internal primary key.

learningItemNumber.title: Assigned Learning Item Number
learningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the learning item. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

learningItemRatingDetails.title: Learning Item Rating Details
learningItemRatingDetails.description: The learningItemRatingDetails resource provides the rating details for it's parent resource. Details include rating identifier, comments, and status.

learningItemRelatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
learningItemRelatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

learningItemType.title: Assigned Learning Item Type
learningItemType.description: Learning item type, such as Course, Specialization, Tutorial, or Video. Valid values are defined in theAssignedLearningItemTypeLOV list.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: The messages resource provides the message text, code, and severity of the messages displayed for the learning item.

offeringPrimaryClassroom.title: Offering Primary Classrooms
offeringPrimaryClassroom.description: The offeringPrimaryClassroom resource provides primary classroom details for the ILT or blended learning offering.

offeringPrimaryInstructor.title: Offering Primary Instructors
offeringPrimaryInstructor.description: The offeringPrimaryInstructor resource provides the details for the primary instructor of the learning offering. Details include instructor identifier, display name, and email address

primaryClassroomType.title: Offering Primary Classroom Type
primaryClassroomType.description: Primary classroom type, such as Physical Classroom, Virtual Classroom, or No Location Defined.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

reasonCode.title: Status Change Reason Code
reasonCode.description: Reason code for the other selected course offering assignment. Valid values are defined in the ReasonCodeLOV list.

requestedCompleteByDate.title: Request Completion Date
requestedCompleteByDate.description: Learning request completion by date specified on the past renewal assignment for the selected course offering.

requestedStartDate.title: Enrolled on Date
requestedStartDate.description: Request start date specified for the selected learning offering assignment.

sourceId.title: Enrollment Source Identifier
sourceId.description: Unique identifier for the source where this assignment was created.

sourceType.title: Enrollment Source Type
sourceType.description: Type for the source where this assignment was created, such as Recommendation or Search.

statusChangeComment.title: Comments
statusChangeComment.description: Status change comment for the other selected learning course offering.

transactionHistory.title: Transaction Histories
transactionHistory.description: The transactionHistory resource provides the transaction history for its parent resource. Details include transaction identifier, transaction number, transaction date, and transaction reason.

userActionHints.title: User Action Hints
userActionHints.description: The userActionHints resource provides hints for possible actions on a learner's assignment records.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description: The attachments resource is used to view, create, and update attachments.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: Learner comment in conversations for active and completed learning item learners.

commentStatus.title: Comment Status
commentStatus.description: Learner comment status in conversations for active and completed learning item learners. Valid values are defined in the CommentStatusLOV list.

dataSecurityPrivilege.title: Data Security Privilege
dataSecurityPrivilege.description: Data security privilege, such as Learner or Learner Manager. It's the intent and permissions for the user accessing the learning assignment. Valid values are defined in the DataSecurityPrivilegeLOV list.

likes.title: Likes
likes.description: The likes resource provides details of the likes for comments by active and completed learners for the learning item.

replies.title: Replies
replies.description: The replies resource provides details of the replies to comments by active and completed learners for the learning item.

likeStatus.description: Status for the comment like. Valid values are defined in the LikeStatusLOV list.

approvalOutcome.title: Approval Outcome
approvalOutcome.description: Approval outcome, such as Approve or Reject. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentApprovalOutcomeLOV list.

approverActionDate.title: Approver Action Date
approverActionDate.description: Date when the approver took action on the learning enrollment approval request.

approverComments.title: Approver Comments
approverComments.description: Approver comments for the learning enrollment.

approverDisplayName.title: Approver Display Name
approverDisplayName.description: Display name for the learning enrollment approver.

approverPrimaryEmailAddress.title: Approver Primary Email Address
approverPrimaryEmailAddress.description: Primary email address for the learning enrollment approver.

approverUserName.title: Approver User Name
approverUserName.description: User name for the learning enrollment approver.

assignedToApproverDate.title: Assigned to Approver Date
assignedToApproverDate.description: Date when the learning assignment approval request was assigned to the approver.

assignmentRecordId.title: Enrollment Record ID
assignmentRecordId.description: Unique identifier for the learning enrollment.

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of approval, such as Learning Request, Learning Assignment Withdrawal. Valid values are defined in the AssignmentApprovalTypeLOV list.

worklistTaskDisplayURL.title: Worklist Task Display URL
worklistTaskDisplayURL.description: URL to open the worklist task directly from the browser.

activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.title: Activity Attempt Exempted Reason Code
activityAttemptCompletionReasonCode.description: Reason code for completion of a learning activity attempt.

activityAttemptStatus.title: Activity Attempt Status
activityAttemptStatus.description: Status for the activity the learner is working on. Valid values include ORA_ASSN_TASK_COMPLETED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_EXEMPTED, ORA_ASSN_TASK_INCOMPLETE, ORA_ASSN_TASK_NOT_STARTED, and ORA_ASSN_TASK_IN_PROGRESS. Valid value are defined in the list ActivityAttemptStatusLOV.

activityCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Completion Predecessor Hints
activityCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activityCompletionPredecessorHint resource provides hints for the learning activity predecessor when sequencing is enabled.

activityContentAttempts.title: Activity Content Attempts
activityContentAttempts.description: The activityContentAttempts resource provides the content and attempts details of the parent learning item type. Content details include content identifier, content number, and content type. Attempts details include activity identifier, activity number, start date, and end date.

activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.title: Activity Section Completion Predecessor Hints
activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint.description: The activitySectionCompletionPredecessorHint provides hints for the predecessor of the learning activity section when sequencing is enabled.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.description: The classrooms resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the classroom details for the instructor-led activities associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.description: The instructors resource is a child of the completionDetails resource. It provides the instructors associated with instructor-led and blended offerings.

offeredLanguages.title: Offered Languages
offeredLanguages.description: The offeredLanguages resource provides the offering language for a learning item.

offeredLocations.title: Offered Locations
offeredLocations.description: The offeredLocations resource provides the location details for a learning item.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire Responses
questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

relatedMaterials.title: Related Materials
relatedMaterials.description: The learningItemRelatedMaterials resource provides related materials for the learning item associated with a learning assignment.

actualEffort.title: Actual Effort
actualEffort.description: Quantity for the learner effort spent in the attempt.

contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link
contentCatalogLearningItemDataLink.description: Data link to the catalog learning item added to the activity.

help.instruction: Content Catalog Learning Item Data Link

contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.title: Content Catalog Learning Item Number
contentCatalogLearningItemNumber.description: Friendly number identifying the catalog learning item added to the activity. It's a surrogate key that's shown in the user interface.

contentURL.title: Content URL
contentURL.description: URL to open the eLearning content directly from the browser.

elearnQuestionnaireId.description: Unique identifier for the questionnaire that's the self-paced assessment learning activity.

questionnaireResponses.description: The questionnaireResponses resource includes the details of the attempts made by a participant when responding to a questionnaire.

QuestionnaireVersionNumber.description: Version number of the questionnaire that the participant responds to.

Status.description: Status of the questionnaire response. I denotes the response is in progress and not submitted yet, while S denotes a submitted response.

questionResponses.description: The questionResponses resource is a child of the questionnaireResponses resource. It includes responses to specific questions within a questionnaire.

Metadata-Context.description: If the REST API supports runtime customizations, the shape of the service may change during runtime. The REST client may isolate itself from these changes or choose to interact with the latest version of the API by specifying this header. For example: Metadata-Context:sandbox="TrackEmployeeFeature".

REST-Framework-Version.description: The protocol version between a REST client and service. If the client does not specify this header in the request the server will pick a default version for the API.
